holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: CTIF is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Parker-Hannifin stock at 5.73%, Snap-on at 5.54%, W.W. Grainger at 5.51%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 5.49%, and Hubbell at 5.06%.

overview.description: The Castellan Targeted Income ETF (CTIF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in US-listed dividend-paying companies combined with a covered call overlay. The actively managed ETF uses a proprietary methodology that blends both quantitative and qualitative analysis. CTIF was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Castellan.
